/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_minion.dir/tests/test_minion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_minion.dir/src/minion/MinionSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_minion.dir/src/minion/MinionConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_minion.dir/src/map/MapLoader.cpp.o -o test_minion  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libspdlog.1.17.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libvulkan.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfmt.12.1.0.dylib
